dataset.title: DEATHS BY CAUSE OF DEATHS, AGE AND SEX FOR MEDICALLY CERTIFIED DEATHS - 2024
dataset.short_description: Deaths by cause of death, age and sex for medically certified deaths in Delhi, 2024.
dataset.long_description: Deaths by cause of deaths, age and sex for medically certified deaths only. Detailed breakdown by ICD-10 categories, sub-categories and specific diseases. Imported from 2024 Delhi Birth and Death registration workbook, Table D-11.

cause_of_death_categories: Diseases of the Blood & blood forming organs and certain disorders involving the immune mechanism (D50-D89)
Diseases of the eye and adnexa (H00-H59)
Diseases of the ear and mastoid process (H60-H95)
Diseases of the skin and subcutaneous tissue (L00-L99)
Diseases of the Musculoskeletal system connective tissue (M00-M99)
DISEASES OF THE GENITOURINARY SYSTEM (N00 - N99)
Certain conditions originating in the perinatal period (P00-P96)
Symptoms, Signs and abnormal clinical &Laboratory finding not elsewhere classified (R00-R99)
Injury, poisoning and certain other consequences of external causes (S00-T98)
External causes of Morbidity and Mortality (V01-Y89)

table.note: Rows are hierarchical: major_category > sub_category > specific_disease. Use major_roman and sub_sl fields to navigate the hierarchy.
